_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》002·v4又聋又哑版(story/arc-01·002《我的保命话，只有一个字》)。💣本集爆点=验身前夜保命特训——不靠字(她不认识)、不靠解释(她听不懂),小桃【抱着头演'疼'】,她连猜带学,用一晚上换来此生第一个中文字。★口径(script-rules 1-2 v4):教学=比划释义+带读跟读——b03小桃抱头哼哼演'疼'→b03c/b03d她【看】表演【猜】词义→b04跟读→b05b靠【看小桃点头】确认学对(不是听懂夸奖);装虚弱=小桃【演示】躺下闭眼她照猜(b07)。全集无一处'听懂'、无一处'认字'、无写字。她开口只有跟读的'疼'。★黄金3秒:首帧=深夜红嫁衣独坐盘算,首句'天一亮医生就来验身+我会说的中文救不了命'。触发器:生死利害+与我有关(学外语保命)+好奇缺口(一个字怎么学/学哪个)≥3。本集中文:疼(téng,她用命换的第一个词;声调翻车梗)。头钩=E01尾钩(大夫要来);尾钩=脚步声+小桃变脸,她猜:医生提前到了吗(=E03头钩)。连戏:同一夜——女主红嫁衣;小桃与E01同款look(象牙白真丝缎蕾丝细吊带+雾霾蓝缎面开衩短裙+金腰链+金圈耳环+细金项链+裸色高跟,同一时间线不换装,render-rules 2连戏铁律)。⚠️仅脚本待审,未build未出图(用户指示先别出图)。

shots.content: Night scene: the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery sits on the floor beside the carved wedding bed hugging her knees, staring ahead with huge desperate terrified eyes rimmed red, jaw set with a flicker of stubborn determination, a single red candle burning low beside her casting deep shadows in the opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, long black hair disheveled, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, her single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Trời sáng là bác sĩ đến khám người

captions.zh: 我会说的中文，救不了命
captions.local: chỗ tiếng Trung tôi biết cứu không nổi mạng
Tôi là cô dâu giả đến từ Việt Nam
Muốn sống thì phải giống một người bệnh

shots.content: Full-body luxury fashion-editorial wide shot of the sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a sleek low ponytail with face-framing strands, slim slender long-legged figure — wearing the SAME fashionable two-piece look as before (same-night continuity): an ivory silk-satin camisole with delicate THIN spaghetti straps and fine French lace trim along the neckline, with a soft luxurious sheen, fitted and slightly cropped to bare a sliver of her slim waist (NOT a plain cotton tank top, NOT thick straps, NOT a bustier, NOT a cheap dance costume), a SEPARATE high-waisted dusty-blue silk-satin mini skirt with a subtle side slit (NOT a pleated school skirt), a delicate thin gold waist chain, small gold hoop earrings and a dainty gold pendant necklace, strappy nude high heels — showing her very fair slim long bare legs, skin uniformly very fair porcelain-pale, the EXACT same pale tone on face, neck, shoulders, arms, hands, legs and feet, NO two-tone skin, NO tanned or yellowish limbs, NO color mismatch. She is ACTING OUT a headache in an exaggerated pantomime: both hands clutching her own head, face scrunched up in theatrical fake pain, mouth wide open mid-groan saying a word, leaning slightly forward performing toward the camera, warm candlelight in the dim opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO audience visible, her whole body visible with high heels on the floor in correct realistic proportion. Cinematic full-body shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Tiểu Đào ôm đầu rên hừ hừ
Téng, téng
Cô ấy ôm đầu kêu cái âm này
'Téng' chắc là đau, là khó chịu

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, long black hair loose, sitting at the edge of the carved wedding bed at night practicing one syllable — lips carefully rounded mid-word, brow furrowed in fierce desperate concentration, both fists clenched on her lap, a red candle glowing beside her, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, her single face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Téng… téng
Đúng rồi, cứ nói vậy
Cô ấy gật đầu — đúng âm này rồi
Một chữ luyện cả trăm lần
Âm lệch một cái là lộ ngay

shots.content: The sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a sleek low ponytail, wearing the SAME ivory silk-satin lace-trimmed thin-strap camisole with a luxurious sheen, SAME high-waisted dusty-blue silk-satin mini skirt, thin gold waist chain, small gold hoop earrings and dainty gold pendant necklace as the previous scenes (same-night continuity), her fair skin uniformly porcelain-pale with NO two-tone mismatch — DEMONSTRATING how to act weak and ill: eyes gently closed, head tilted limply to one side, both palms pressed together resting under her tilted cheek in a 'sleeping/fainting' gesture, knees slightly bent in a mock swoon, performing earnestly, warm candlelight in the dim opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO audience visible, her single face in frame. Cinematic three-quarter shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Cô ấy diễn cho tôi xem: nằm im, nhắm mắt
Hiểu rồi — giả yếu ớt, hạn chế mở miệng

shots.content: The stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery stands by the lattice window in the first pale grey-blue light of dawn, the red candle on the table beside her burnt down to a guttering stub, her face half lit by the cold dawn and half by the dying warm candle flame, exhausted but with fierce determined frightened eyes, long black hair loose, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, her single face in frame. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Ngọn nến đã cháy đến tận chân
Toàn bộ vốn liếng của tôi: một chữ
cộng thêm một đôi mắt biết nhìn

shots.content: Close-up of the sweet young Chinese maid Xiao Tao with straight bangs and a sleek low ponytail, wearing the SAME ivory silk-satin lace-trimmed thin-strap camisole with a luxurious sheen and dainty gold pendant necklace as the previous scenes (same-night continuity), her head snapped toward the tall carved bedroom door, eyes wide with sudden alarm, lips parted, one hand frozen mid-air, the color draining from her face, tense thriller mood in the dim dawn-lit opulent Chinese mansion bedroom, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, her single face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Ngoài cửa, tiếng bước chân mỗi lúc một gần
Mặt Tiểu Đào trắng bệch đi
Là bác sĩ đến sớm rồi sao
Theo dõi tập sau nhé
